matchingDescription: Android smartphone with Snapdragon processor, consumer mobile hardware

variants.text: The Xiaomi 14 is lightning fast thanks to the powerful Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor paired with 12GB RAM for smooth performance.
With fast UFS 4.0 storage, the Xiaomi 14 loads apps and transfers files quickly — built for users who demand responsive performance.
12GB of RAM and a Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor make the Xiaomi 14 well-suited to multitasking and demanding mobile apps.
Upgrading your smartphone? The Xiaomi 14 pairs flagship Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 performance with fast UFS 4.0 storage and 12GB RAM.
For gaming and heavy app use, the Xiaomi 14's Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor and 12GB RAM deliver the power to keep up.
